## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] New port
- [ ] Port fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Palette change
- [ ] Validation/checks
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] I used the canonical Koppi palette.
- [ ] I avoided user-specific paths.
- [ ] I avoided full app config when a theme-only file was possible.
- [ ] I updated `README.md` if installation changed.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] I updated `scripts/check.sh` if new files were added.
- [ ] I added or updated screenshots when practical.
- [ ] I ran `./scripts/check.sh`.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for visual changes when practical.
